title: QuickCoordChat
description: Send messages with coordinates and dimension in one click.
body:
## ⚡ QuickCoordChat

QuickCoordChat is a lightweight client-side mod that lets you instantly send predefined messages — with or without coordinates — using customizable hotkeys.

---

## ✨ Features

- Send messages instantly with hotkeys (Message1–Message5)
- Option to include coordinates and dimension
- Fully customizable key bindings (keyboard & mouse buttons)
- Prevents accidental triggers (no spam, no GUI conflicts)
- Death location message (optional)
- YAML-based config (easy to edit)
- Multi-language support (22 languages)
- Clean and simple UI
- Works entirely client-side (no server required)

---

## 🌍 Example

Help me! [Overworld] X=123 Y=64 Z=-77

---

## ⚙️ Configuration

All settings are saved in:

config/quickcoordchat/config.yml

- Customize messages
- Enable/disable coordinate sending
- Change key bindings
- Toggle death messages

---

## 🌐 Language Support

Supports 22 languages with automatic client-language detection.

---

## 🧩 Compatibility

- Minecraft: 1.21.6 – 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader required
- Works on any server (including Vanilla)

---

## 💡 Why this mod?

In modern Minecraft, communication speed matters.

QuickCoordChat allows you to instantly share your situation without opening chat or typing coordinates manually.

---

## 👤 Author

Created by pinecraft77

---

## 📦 Notes

- This is a client-side mod — safe to use on any server
- No impact on server performance
- No required dependencies beyond Fabric API
